title: Vivi Sends Word Home
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on vivi sends word home, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Vivi Sends Word Home. Ace steps between Luffy and the Marines, showing his strength while Vivi pushes the mission toward stopping Crocodile. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Other than that, I've written down how I'm still alive,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And will return soon to Alabasta with reliable friends.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: ...Can you do it?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: You'll have to cross the desert all alone.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Quack!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Good, just remember to conserve your water in the desert.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Quick

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then hurry up and send the word to my father!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That we can still save this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quaack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gulp Gulp Gulp Gulp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I said conserve your water!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You too!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Don't waste the water we just bought!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: brother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That guy earlier... Is your brother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, he's my older brother.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm not surprised by the fact that you have a brother,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But what's he also doing in the Grand Line?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's also searching for One Piece.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ace is 3 years older,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So he left our hometown 3 years earlier than me.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: To think that both brothers would end up eating a devil fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, that surprised me too, HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He didn't have a devil fruit ability back when we lived together.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But even then, I could never beat him in a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Not even once.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ace is really strong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Y-you couldn't beat him even once? When he was just a normal human?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guess the brother of a monster is an even bigger monster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, I got my ass handed to me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But I could take him on now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do you have any evidence to back up that bluff?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can take on who now?

summary: This part highlights vivi sends word home and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
